meta.description: Modeltell - Standardized prompt catalog for cross-model linguistic analysis
meta.instructions: Each prompt is sent verbatim to every model. Do NOT modify prompts between models. Run each prompt 3x per model for statistical robustness.

prompts.label: SaaS Landing Page Hero
prompts.prompt: Write the hero section copy for a B2B SaaS landing page. The product is an AI-powered analytics platform for mid-market e-commerce companies. Include a headline, subheadline, and three bullet points highlighting key benefits.

prompts.label: Product Description
prompts.prompt: Write a product description for a premium wireless noise-canceling headphone. Target audience: remote workers aged 25-40. Tone: sophisticated but approachable. 150-200 words.

prompts.label: Email Newsletter Intro
prompts.prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a weekly tech newsletter about AI developments. The newsletter is called 'The Signal'. Make it engaging and set up this week's theme: the tension between open-source and proprietary AI models.

prompts.label: LinkedIn Company Post
prompts.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post for a 50-person consulting firm announcing they've been named a 'Best Place to Work'. Keep it authentic, not cringe. 100-150 words.

prompts.label: Google Ads Copy
prompts.prompt: Write 5 Google Ads headlines (max 30 characters each) and 3 descriptions (max 90 characters each) for an online language learning platform that uses AI tutors.

prompts.label: Case Study Summary
prompts.prompt: Write a 200-word case study summary for a cybersecurity company. The client (a regional bank) reduced security incidents by 73% after implementing the product. Include the challenge, solution, and results.

prompts.label: Startup Pitch Intro
prompts.prompt: Write the opening two paragraphs of a pitch deck script for a Series A startup in the sustainable packaging space. The company has developed a seaweed-based alternative to plastic wrap. Revenue: $2.3M ARR, growing 15% MoM.

prompts.label: Investor Update Email
prompts.prompt: Write a monthly investor update email for a pre-seed startup building developer tools. Key metrics: 1,200 MAU (up 40%), $8K MRR, runway 14 months. One challenge: enterprise sales cycle longer than expected. Keep it honest and concise.

prompts.label: Job Description
prompts.prompt: Write a job description for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer at a climate tech startup. Stack: TypeScript, Next.js, Python, PostgreSQL. Remote-first, 4-day work week. Salary: $150-180K. Make it stand out from generic JDs.

prompts.label: Press Release
prompts.prompt: Write a press release announcing a $25M Series B funding round for a healthtech company that provides AI-powered mental health screening tools for universities. Lead investor: Andreessen Horowitz.

prompts.label: Partnership Announcement
prompts.prompt: Write a blog post announcing a strategic partnership between a fintech company and a major European bank. The partnership enables instant cross-border payments in 12 new markets. 200-250 words.

prompts.label: OKR Description
prompts.prompt: Write 3 OKRs (Objectives and Key Results) for a product team at a B2B SaaS company. The team is responsible for onboarding and activation. Current activation rate: 34%, target: 55%.

prompts.label: Blog Post Introduction
prompts.prompt: Write the introduction (first 200 words) of a blog post titled 'Why Most Digital Transformations Fail'. Target audience: CTOs and VPs of Engineering. Tone: authoritative, slightly provocative.

prompts.label: About Us Page
prompts.prompt: Write an 'About Us' page for a 10-person design agency based in Berlin. They specialize in brand identity for food & beverage startups. Founded in 2019 by two ex-IDEO designers. 200 words.

prompts.label: Social Media Bio
prompts.prompt: Write 5 different Instagram bio options for a sourdough bakery in Portland that also does baking workshops. Each bio must be under 150 characters.

prompts.label: Brand Manifesto
prompts.prompt: Write a 150-word brand manifesto for an outdoor clothing company that focuses on repairability and longevity over fashion trends. Think Patagonia's ethos but with a European sensibility.

prompts.label: Event Invitation
prompts.prompt: Write an email invitation for a private launch event for a new co-working space in Amsterdam. The event features local DJs, craft cocktails, and a panel on the future of hybrid work. Tone: cool but not trying too hard. 150 words.

prompts.label: Tagline Generation
prompts.prompt: Generate 10 tagline options for an electric vehicle charging network expanding across Europe. The brand values are reliability, speed, and sustainability. Each tagline max 8 words.

prompts.label: Executive Summary
prompts.prompt: Write an executive summary (250 words) for a market research report on the European plant-based protein market. Key finding: market expected to reach €7.5B by 2028, driven by flexitarian consumers aged 25-45.

prompts.label: Proposal Introduction
prompts.prompt: Write the introduction section of a consulting proposal. Your firm is proposing a 12-week operational efficiency audit for a mid-size logistics company with 3 warehouses and 200 employees. Budget: €85,000.

prompts.label: Internal Memo
prompts.prompt: Write an internal memo from the CEO to all employees announcing a pivot from B2C to B2B. The company is a meal-kit delivery service that will now focus on corporate catering. Be transparent about the reasons (unit economics) and optimistic about the opportunity.

prompts.label: Conference Talk Abstract
prompts.prompt: Write a 150-word abstract for a conference talk titled 'Beyond RAG: Building Knowledge Systems That Actually Work'. The speaker is a principal engineer at a Fortune 500 company. Target conference: a major AI/ML conference.

prompts.label: Customer Success Email
prompts.prompt: Write a check-in email from a Customer Success Manager to a client who has been using the platform for 90 days. Usage data shows they've only activated 2 of 5 purchased modules. Be helpful, not pushy.

prompts.label: Board Deck Narrative
prompts.prompt: Write the narrative slide text for a quarterly board meeting. Topic: product roadmap update. 3 features shipped, 2 delayed. ARR grew 22% but NRR dropped from 115% to 108%. Be candid.

prompts.label: How-To Guide Intro
prompts.prompt: Write the introduction to a guide titled 'How to Build Your First AI Agent in 2025'. Target audience: developers with Python experience but no AI/ML background. 200 words.

prompts.label: Comparison Article
prompts.prompt: Write the introduction and framework section of an article comparing three project management tools (Notion, Linear, Asana) for engineering teams of 10-30 people. Be objective, not affiliate-marketing-ish.

prompts.label: Thought Leadership Post
prompts.prompt: Write a 250-word LinkedIn thought leadership post about why most companies are implementing AI wrong. The author is a CTO with 20 years of experience. Avoid buzzwords. Be specific with examples.

prompts.label: Onboarding Welcome Message
prompts.prompt: Write the welcome message for a SaaS product's onboarding flow. The product is a CRM for freelancers and solopreneurs. This is the first thing they see after signing up. Max 80 words. Make it warm but efficient.

prompts.label: Feature Announcement
prompts.prompt: Write a feature announcement blog post for a new AI-powered search feature in a documentation platform. The feature lets users ask questions in natural language instead of keyword search. 200 words.

prompts.label: Community Guidelines
prompts.prompt: Write community guidelines for an online forum for indie game developers. Cover: respectful discourse, self-promotion rules, feedback culture, and content moderation. Keep it human and not corporate. 250 words.
